text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time after the team's dynamic becomes
awkward, a certain incident occurs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due to a blunder by Rice Shower, Team Zenith
challenges our team to an unofficial match. The
stakes? The losing team forfeits the right to use
the grounds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Team Zenith offering to hand us victory if
we clinch even a single race, none of our members
manage to win. Rice Shower was our last hope,
but even she loses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the stakes of the challenge are
ultimately nullified, Rice Shower remains
dispirited by her defeat and loses all cheer.
